bio: Jorge Taiana served as Argentina's Foreign Minister under President [Cristina Fernández de Kirchner](/people/cristina-fernandez-de-kirchner) from 2005 to 2010, and was later appointed Defence Minister under President Alberto Fernández from 2021 to 2023.
editorial_notes: Corrected April 2026: Taiana was NOT named in Nisman's treason charges — that was Héctor Timerman (FM 2010–2015). Taiana was FM 2005–2010, before the MOU. Defence Minister 2021–2023 under Alberto Fernández.
